statement.text: Our software monitors, protects, and builds the {{highlight}} of organizations that operate where exposure isn't an option.

calarOS.title: Calar OS
calarOS.description1: Calar OS shows you who is on your site and how they move through your funnel. It connects visits back to the channels and campaigns that drove them.
calarOS.description2: Leads are scored from on-site behavior in real time.

development.title: Development
development.description: Clean architecture, production-ready code, and nothing you don't need. We design and ship web systems that will not need to be rebuilt.

visualIdentity.title: Visual identity
visualIdentity.description1: Brand systems, typography, colour, and art direction so your product and marketing feel like one coherent story.
visualIdentity.description2: We align visuals with how you actually operate: clear guidelines your team can ship with, not a deck that sits in a folder.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: We are a small team that builds serious digital infrastructure. We care about the work and the people we work with.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description1: We work with organizations to assess, plan, and improve their digital presence.
consulting.description2: From infrastructure decisions to platform strategy, we give you a clear picture of where you are and a concrete path to where you need to be.

contact.heading: Ready for the next step?
contact.subtext: Hepta delivers solutions for organizations that take their digital presence seriously.
